_note: Shared singletons of the PND onchain protocols on Ethereum mainnet. `catalog` and `auctionHouseFactory` are deployed; the Surface System singletons (`surfaceFactory`, `defaultRenderer`, `renderAssets`) are pre-deploy and empty until launch. Fill an empty value and re-run `pnpm generate:docs` to resolve its address and cast examples. Per-owner clones (an artist collection, an auction house) are separate EIP-1167 clones with no entry here.
